message:
Add world-class UI/UX enhancements for desktop and mobile

New components:
- TextReveal: Word-by-word staggered animation for headlines
- AnimatedCounter: Count-up animation with spring physics
- ScrollProgressBar: Visual scroll position indicator
- ActiveFilterChips: Animated filter chip management
- KeyboardShortcutsModal: Help modal for keyboard shortcuts
- BottomTabBar: Mobile-first bottom navigation with haptics
- SwipeablePromptCard: Swipe gestures for copy/basket actions

New hooks:
- useHaptic: Vibration API with reduced motion support
- useKeyboardShortcuts: Global shortcuts with sequences
- useSwipeGesture: Touch gesture detection

Enhanced components:
- Hero: Mouse-following gradient, animated orbs, staggered entrances
- SpotlightSearch: Full-screen mobile mode, category pills, recent searches

Bug fixes in fresh eyes review:
- TextReveal: Remove misleading 'as' prop, clarify usage docs
- AnimatedCounter: Fix SSR hydration mismatch with reduced motion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
